meaning: vt.碾碎,使弯曲vi.嘎吱嘎吱地作响,蜷缩n.嘎吱嘎吱的响声
examples: Her feet scrunch on the gravel.
She scrunch it up and throw it in the bin.
Do the "scrunch test" to see if clothes stay wrinkly.
With the iPhone, he had to scrunch down his graphics down to fit into a tiny window.
The onscreen keyboard and dialpad, for example, can scrunch over to either side for easier use when only one hand is available.
